# Diagnostic lead magnet

## When to use

Use for complex B2B problems.

## Why it works

Diagnoses pain before selling.

## Mechanism

Buyers accept help when problem is uncertain.

## Required inputs

Scorecard, calculator, audit, teardown.

## When not to use

If it is generic and not useful.

## Campaign artifact checklist

```text
Buyer state:
Audience:
Pain phrase:
Offer:
Proof asset:
Landing page:
Ad variants:
Measurement event:
Kill rule:
Next test if failed:
```

## Metrics

Completion rate, qualified leads, calls booked.

## Agent instruction

Generate at least five ad variants, one landing-page proof path, one measurement plan, and one learning memo template for this tactic.
